name: Great Milkidromeda War RPG
description:
Andromeda declared war on milky way

Defend humans or any other space cilivization against andromedians!

History

*June 26th 2106 year. First traveler travels to Andromeda and finds a massive cilivization of Andromedians.*

*December 2nd 2145 year. In Andromeda started to rise nationalistic ideologies. Slowly they start to think that others must be exterminated. Their people are wanting to declare war on governments of milky way. This was **actual reason** for war*

*On November 5th 2168 year. ATO (Anarchist timed organisation) founder Captured Andromedian gonvernor. That was this action became Andromedian pretext for war. for war. Andromeda declared war on entire Milky way, Starting great milkidromeda war.
creator: Evolya
